title: Find First Child With Attribute
goal: Searches children of an instance, returning the first child containing an attribute matching the given name and value.

steps.body:
Searches children of an instance, returning the first child containing an attribute matching the given name and value.

The DemoScript removes flavors from an ice cream cone in the correct order using findFirstChildWithAttribute

This sample was ported from `solutions-samples/find-first-child-with-attribute`. Every step is deterministic — watch the components assemble under `Workspace.FindFirstChildWithAttribute`.
Add a Folder `FindFirstChildWithAttribute` under `Workspace` to hold this sample.

steps.source:
--!strict

--[[
	Searches children of an instance, returning the first child containing an attribute
	matching the given name and value.
--]]

local function findFirstChildWithAttribute(parent: Instance, attributeName: string, attributeValue: any): Instance?
	local children = parent:GetChildren()

	for _, child in pairs(children) do
		if child:GetAttribute(attributeName) == attributeValue then
			return child
		end
	end

	return nil
end

return findFirstChildWithAttribute

steps.body: Add a Folder `Demo` under `Workspace.FindFirstChildWithAttribute` to hold this sample.
Clone the bundled `IceCreamCone` instance tree into `Workspace.FindFirstChildWithAttribute.Demo`.

steps.source:
--[[
	Searches children of an instance, returning the first child containing an attribute matching the given name and value.
	The DemoScript removes flavors from an ice cream cone in the correct order using findFirstChildWithAttribute
--]]

local findFirstChildWithAttribute = require(script.Parent.Parent.findFirstChildWithAttribute)

local iceCreamCone = script.Parent.IceCreamCone
local ATTRIBUTE_NAME = "Order"

-- Wait some time before removing flavors
task.wait(5)

for attributeValue = 1, 3 do
	-- Get the flavor based on the "Order" attribute and value
	local flavor = findFirstChildWithAttribute(iceCreamCone, ATTRIBUTE_NAME, attributeValue)

	-- Transition the flavor's transparency to 1 over time
	task.wait(0.5)
	flavor.Transparency = 0.5
	task.wait(0.5)
	flavor.Transparency = 1
end

steps.body: Press ▶ Play (or F5) to see the sample run in-place. Shift+F5 to stop. Inspect `Workspace.FindFirstChildWithAttribute` in the Explorer to see the assembled result.
